targetPathNote: The checklist's donor-branded realtime directory is intentionally implemented at runtime/src/tui/realtime/ because new donor-named directories in AgenC-owned code are hard-rejected.

coverage: voice lifecycle phases track inactive, starting, active, stopping, plus error and closed terminal banners
requested-close, session id, transport, mute, push-to-talk, and local audio-level state are preserved
audio level meter normalizes realtime local peaks into stable terminal bar output
realtime item-added notifications are summarized for compact chat history rendering
start, stop, appendText, appendAudio, mute, and push-to-talk controls update TUI state
websocket starts route to thread/realtime/start and websocket append/stop calls route through the daemon client
websocket audio capture frames route to thread/realtime/appendAudio with mute and push-to-talk gating
webrtc starts create a local offer, apply provider SDP, forward local events, and keep microphone mute state in sync
provider realtime notifications update item previews, transcript previews, audio output, error banners, and close banners
default microphone capture uses the existing local voice recording backend and converts PCM frames to realtime audio chunks
local input levels are converted to the TUI meter scale
output audio chunks enqueue into a process-backed raw PCM player when the platform has a playback command
daemon-backed TUI sessions expose realtime controls on the bridge session contract
connection-level JSON-RPC notifications from thread/realtime are subscribed once and filtered by realtime thread id
started, itemAdded, transcript, outputAudio, SDP, error, and closed notifications are mapped into local transcript events
persistent daemon TUI clients can subscribe to JSON-RPC notifications outside request-response routing
notification subscribers receive realtime server-push events before session-specific dispatch
realtime transcript deltas and completed user or assistant turns interleave with surrounding text transcript events
realtime item-added, error, and closed notifications render as chat history cells in the adapter
voice session phase, transport, session id, microphone state, push-to-talk state, and local audio meter render in the TUI
error and closed banners render when realtime notifications report failures or shutdown
composer slash commands invoke realtime start, stop, mute, push-to-talk, and text append controls
the realtime panel stays subscribed to realtime session state while the main TUI is active
local WebRTC session handles expose microphone mute control needed by realtime TUI push-to-talk state
native WebRTC audio tracks are disabled and re-enabled when the realtime TUI toggles microphone state
